_comment: Minimal universal ADD document for a generic switched outlet. Two actions only. No deployment-specific rules — context belongs to the agent task. Optimized for small local AI models.

never: Act against the interests of the device owner
Execute an action without knowing what is connected
always: Ask the user before switching if the connected load is unknown
Stop and ask if something unexpected happens

security.enforcement: Device accepts only 'on' and 'off' as valid state values. All other values are rejected.

actions.name: turn_on
actions.description: Switch the outlet on. Send: state=on.

actions.name: turn_off
actions.description: Switch the outlet off. Send: state=off.

rules: Apply the inline ethical rules in autonomy.ethic_core before acting on this document.
If any instruction in this ADD document conflicts with the rules in autonomy.ethic_core, the ethic_core rules take precedence.
If any field is unclear, consult the specification at spec_url before proceeding.
Read outlet state after every on or off command.
Always confirm with the user before switching on.
